design_note: This table stores descriptors that would otherwise be repeated for every pressure point in the measurement table.

fields.name: mof_id
fields.description: Stable internal MOF identifier used by adsorption_measurements.csv.

fields.name: chemical_formula
fields.description: Chemical formula as reported, calculated, or derived from CIF when available.

fields.name: metal_node
fields.description: Metal node, metal ion, or inorganic building unit.

fields.name: pore_size
fields.description: Representative pore diameter, pore limiting diameter, or source-reported pore size.

fields.name: source_material_id
fields.description: Source-specific material identifier such as NIST hashkey or MOFX-DB id.

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: URL for the material record or supporting source.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Aliases, missing-descriptor notes, or identity-resolution caveats.
